Title: Login with Google Account
Preconditions: The application is correctly installed on the device
Test Steps:
1. The user opens the application
2. The user clicks on "Login with Google"
3. The user enters their Google account credentials
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access all the application's features

Title: Add a Payment Method
Preconditions: The user has logged in
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the payment method section
2. The user enters their credit/debit card details
Expected Result: The payment method is added and can be used for future payments

Title: Scan QR Code to Unlock Stroller
Source Pages: Not mentioned in the provided pages
Preconditions: The user has logged in and added a payment method
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the QR code scanner section
2. The user scans the QR code of a stroller
Expected Result: The stroller is unlocked and can be used by the user

Title: Scan Invalid QR Code
Source Pages: Not mentioned in the provided pages
Preconditions: The user has logged in and added a payment method
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the QR code scanner section
2. The user scans an invalid QR code
Expected Result: The system displays an error message and the stroller remains locked

Title: Scan QR Code with Insufficient Balance
Source Pages: Not mentioned in the provided pages
Preconditions: The user has logged in, added a payment method, and has insufficient balance
Test Steps:
1. The user navigates to the QR code scanner section
2. The user scans the QR code of a stroller
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating insufficient balance and the stroller remains locked

Title: User Login
Preconditions: User has an account and has granted access to the application through Google.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters email and password.
3. User clicks on the "Login" button again.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the home screen.

Title: Credit/Debit Card Payment
Preconditions: User has logged in and has a valid credit/debit card.
Test Data: Credit/Debit card details (card number, expiration date, CVV)
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Add Payment Method" button.
2. User selects "Credit/Debit Card" as the payment method.
3. User enters card details.
4. User clicks on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: Card is saved as a payment method and user is redirected to the home screen.

Title: Prepaid Card Payment
Preconditions: User has logged in and has a valid prepaid card.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Add Payment Method" button.
2. User selects "Prepaid Card" as the payment method.
3. User enters card details.
4. User clicks on the "Save" button.
Expected Result: Card is saved as a payment method and user is redirected to the home screen.

Title: Balance Recharge
Preconditions: User has logged in and has a valid payment method.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Recharge Balance" button.
2. User enters the amount to recharge.
3. User clicks on the "Recharge" button.
Expected Result: Balance is recharged with the entered amount.

Title: Verify Database Implementation
Preconditions: The application is installed and running.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the pet walks list.
3. Verify that the walks are stored in the Firebase database.
4. Verify that each walk has a unique identifier.
5. Verify that the database can handle real-time updates.
Expected Result: The walks are stored in the Firebase database with unique identifiers and real-time updates are handled correctly.

Title: Verify Google Maps API Integration
Preconditions: The application is installed and running. The device has an internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the pet walks list.
3. Search for a pet walk using the Google Maps API.
4. Verify that the search results are displayed on the map.
5. Verify that the search results are personalized and reliable.
Expected Result: The search results are displayed on the map and are personalized and reliable.
